title: viola × fouilladei
intro: Viola × fouilladei, also known as the hybrid viola, is a cross between V. riviniana and V. rivinii, belonging to the violet family (Violaceae). This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Viola × fouilladei include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Viola × fouilladei is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
